raw_text:
9. Tool Maker

Job Summary  
Focuses on producing precision tools, jigs, and fixtures required for manufacturing 
operations.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manufacture tools, gauges, jigs, and fixtures  
• Operate CNC/manual machines  
• Perfor m assembly and testing of tools  
• Ensure high precision and surface finish  
• Maintain tooling records  
Required Skills  
• Machining and tool fabrication expertise  
• Understanding of tolerances and fits  
• CAD/CAM basics (preferred)  
• Inspection and measurement skil ls  
Qualification  
• ITI / Diploma in Tool Making  
Experience  
• 3–5 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹20,000 – ₹35,000 per month
